raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "frontally",
    "Precondition": "The front face of box_1 is fully accessible, with no obstacles (the cup is in front of box_2, not box_1). There is at least 40 cm of clearance in front of the box for the robot to position both end-effectors. The arms can reach the mid-height of the box and align symmetrically.",
    "Postcondition": "Both end-effectors securely press against the front face of box_1, creating enough normal force to hold the 30 cm cardboard box. The robot has full control of box_1 and can begin lifting it."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "Box_1 is already grasped by both arms. The vertical space above the box is free of obstacles, allowing an upward motion of at least 15 cm.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 is lifted several centimeters above the tabletop and held steadily between the two arms, completing the pick-up task."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The front face of box_1 is fully accessible, with no obstacles (the cup is in front of box_2, not box_1). There is at least 40 cm of clearance in front of the box for the robot to position both end-effectors. The arms can reach the mid-height of the box and align symmetrically.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Both end-effectors securely press against the front face of box_1, creating enough normal force to hold the 30 cm cardboard box. The robot has full control of box_1 and can begin lifting it.

parsed_json.Precondition: Box_1 is already grasped by both arms. The vertical space above the box is free of obstacles, allowing an upward motion of at least 15 cm.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 is lifted several centimeters above the tabletop and held steadily between the two arms, completing the pick-up task.
